hooks.command: cmd=$(node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');process.stdout.write(JSON.parse(d)?.tool_input?.command||'')"); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)' || exit 0; cd "/c/Users/Buyen/OneDrive/Desktop/Builds/Clients/aprn-africa" && pnpm lint; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] || printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"pnpm lint failed — fix errors above before committing."}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"Lint gate active — pnpm lint runs automatically before every git commit or push."}'
